SCORE ACCURACY: Claude is correctly conservative on illiquid/thin symbols (MSOS, COO, CMG) but overcorrects on directional ETFs (SOXS, SQQQ) where local 78-80 scores justified by strong gaps + NFP alignment. Sanity filter rescued several by clamping final to 65-72 when Claude went too low. 3 missed 4%+ movers (SOXS 14.95, SQQQ 8.21, MSOS 5.33) late-added to next-day research. Expected value negative (-50.82) suggests position sizing or entry timing needs calibration — consider tighter trailing stops or smaller initial sizing on high-volatility NFP days.
